assertions.title: Измените позиции первого и второго цветов на `33%`.
assertions.name: setFlagBgImageToLinearGradientToBottomYellow33PercLightGreen33PercGreen75PercRed100Perc

assertions.title: Затем измените позиции третьего и четвёртого цветов на `66%`.
assertions.name: setFlagBgImageToLinearGradientToBottomYellow33PercLightGreen33PercGreen66PercRed66Perc

assertions.title: Затем измените второй цвет с `#529379` на `#096540`.
assertions.name: setFlagBgImageToLinearGradientToBottomYellow33PercGreen33PercGreen66PercRed66Perc
